headline: Kabupaten Demak flood update for January 2026
summary: Banjir di Kabupaten Demak delayed classes near affected school areas selama periode peninjauan terbatas.
summary_id: Banjir di Kabupaten Demak delayed classes near affected school areas selama periode peninjauan terbatas.
summary_en: Flooding in Kabupaten Demak delayed classes near affected school areas during the bounded review window.
